hotels.name: Private Executive Suite
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Private Executive Suite se trouve à Waterbury, à respectivement 20 km et 20 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Witch s Dungeon Classic Movie Museum et Lake Compounce. Il possède une cuisine. Cet hébergement est installé à 20 km de : Flanders Nature Center. Il propose une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit.

Cet appartement comporte 1 chambre, une télévision à écran plat, la climatisation et un salon.

Cet établissement dispose d’une aire de jeux pour enfants. Un service de location de voitures est disponible sur place.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 22 km et 32 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Abbaye de Regina Laudis et Yale Bowl. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Tweed-New Haven) est à 41 km.
hotels.description_en:
Modern Comforts: Private Executive Suite in Waterbury offers a recently renovated apartment with one bedroom, one bathroom, and a spacious living room. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a terrace, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Convenient Facilities: The apartment features a kitchenette, washing machine, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, hairdresser/beautician, full-day security, children's playground, and car hire services.
Prime Location: Located 20 km from Flanders Nature Center, Witch S Dungeon Classic Movie Museum, and Lake Compounce, the property is also close to attractions such as The Yale Bowl (32 km) and Yale University (35 km). Tweed-New Haven Airport is 41 km away.
hotels.description_es:
Private Executive Suite está a 20 km de Witch s Dungeon Classic Movie Museum y a 20 km de Lake Compounce, en Waterbury, y ofrece alojamiento con cocina. El alojamiento, que se encuentra a 20 km de Flanders Nature Center, ofrece terraza y parking privado gratis.

Este apartamento de 1 dormitorio ofrece TV de pantalla plana, aire acondicionado y sala de estar.

El apartamento ofrece zona de juegos infantil. Private Executive Suite ofrece servicio de alquiler de coches.

Abadía de Regina Laudis está a 22 km del alojamiento, y Yale Bowl está a 32 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Tweed-New Haven) está a 41 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
A 20 km de Museu da Masmorra da Bruxa e 20 km de Parque Temático Lake Compounce, em Waterbury, Private Executive Suite providencia acomodações com uma cozinha. Situado a 20 km de Flanders Nature Center, o alojamento fornece um terraço e estacionamento privado gratuito.

Este apartamento com 1 quarto dispõe de televisão de ecrã plano, ar condicionado e uma sala de estar.

Private Executive Suite oferece um parque infantil. Private Executive Suite disponibiliza um serviço de aluguer de carros.

Abadia de Regina Laudis fica a 22 km de Private Executive Suite, enquanto The Yale Bowl fica a 32 km de distância. O Aeroporto de Tweed-New Haven fica a 41 km da propriedade.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Private Executive Suite si trova a 20 km da Witch's Dungeon Classic Movie Museum e 20 km da Parco Divertimenti Lake Compounce, a Waterbury, e offre un alloggio con cucina. Situata a 20 km da Flanders Nature Center, la struttura prevede una terrazza e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questo appartamento con 1 camera da letto offre una TV a schermo piatto, l’aria condizionata e un soggiorno.

Questo appartamento offre un’area giochi per bambini. Un servizio di autonoleggio è disponibile presso Private Executive Suite.

Abbey of Regina Laudis è a 22 km da questa struttura, mentre Stadio Yale Bowl si trova a 32 km di distanza. Aeroporto Regionale di Tweed-New Haven si trova a 41 km dalla struttura.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing vous accueille à Torrington, à respectivement 26 km et 28 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Abbaye de Regina Laudis et Flanders Nature Center. Il propose des équipements tels qu’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et une télévision à écran plat. Cet hébergement est installé à 23 km de : Witch s Dungeon Classic Movie Museum. Il comprend un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.

Cette maison de vacances avec climatisation se compose de 2 chambres, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un four et une machine à café, ainsi que de 1 salle de bains avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont à votre disposition.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Litchfield Retreat in Torrington offers a two-bedroom holiday home with a living room. The property features a garden and free WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Modern Amenities: The home includes air-conditioning, a washing machine, and a fully equipped kitchen with a coffee machine and oven. Additional amenities include a TV, dining area, and free toiletries.
Convenient Location: Located 48 km from Bradley International Airport, the property is near attractions such as Witch S Dungeon Classic Movie Museum (23 km) and Lake Compounce (34 km). Free on-site private parking is available.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing se encuentra en Torrington, a 26 km de Abadía de Regina Laudis y a 28 km de Flanders Nature Center, y ofrece alojamiento con equipamiento como wifi gratis y TV de pantalla plana. El alojamiento, que está a 23 km de Witch s Dungeon Classic Movie Museum, dispone de jardín y parking privado gratis.

Esta casa o chalet con aire acondicionado consta de 2 dormitorios, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con horno y cafetera, y 1 baño con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en la casa o chalet.

Lake Compounce está a 34 km del alojamiento, y Elizabeth Park está a 37 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bradley) está a 48 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing encontra-se em Torrington, a 26 km de Abadia de Regina Laudis e 28 km de Flanders Nature Center, e providencia acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e uma televisão de ecrã plano. Situado a 23 km de Museu da Masmorra da Bruxa, o alojamento apresenta um jardim e estacionamento privado gratuito.

Esta casa de férias com ar condicionado tem 2 quartos, uma sala de estar, uma cozinha totalmente equipada com forno e máquina de café, e 1 casa de banho com chuveiro e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas nesta casa de férias.

Parque Temático Lake Compounce fica a 34 km de Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing, enquanto Elizabeth Park está a 37 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
A Torrington, a 26 km da Abbey of Regina Laudis e 28 km da Flanders Nature Center, Litchfield Retreat, Wineries, Foliage & Skiing offre un alloggio con servizi quali WiFi gratuito e TV a schermo piatto. Situata a 23 km da Witch's Dungeon Classic Movie Museum, la struttura propone un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questa casa vacanze con aria condizionata comprende 2 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, forno e macchina da caffè, e 1 bagno con doccia e set di cortesia. Presso questa casa vacanze troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi disponibili.

Parco Divertimenti Lake Compounce è a 34 km da questa casa vacanze, mentre Elizabeth Park si trova a 37 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto Internazionale Bradley si trova a 48 km di distanza.

hotels.name: The Litchfield Inn
hotels.description_fr:
Cet établissement de Litchfield, dans le Connecticut, se trouve à 3,4 km de la forêt d'État de Topsmead. Il propose des chambres à la décoration unique dotées d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Il n'y a pas de restaurant sur place.
Toutes les chambres du The Litchfield Inn comprennent une télévision par câble. Chaque chambre dispose d'une climatisation réglable. Certaines chambres présentent une décoration à thème.
L'établissement possède un centre d'affaires.
Le petit-déjeuner est inclus dans le tarif des chambres de 7 à 10h00 tous les jours.
Le centre de conservation White Memorial est à 1 kilomètre de l'établissement. Le Railroad Museum of New England se trouve à 16 minutes en voiture.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
This Litchfield, Connecticut guest accommodation is 3.4 miles from Topsmead State Forest. The property features uniquely decorated guest rooms with free WiFi. On-site dining is not available.
Cable TV is included in all rooms at The The Litchfield Inn. Individual climate control is provided in every room. Some rooms feature a themed design.
A business centre is available at the property.
Breakfast is included with all rooms 7 to 10 am daily.
The White Memorial Conservation Center is 1 mile from the property. The Railroad Museum of New England is a 16-minute drive away.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Este establecimiento se encuentra en Litchfield, Connecticut, a 3,4 millas del bosque estatal de Topsmead. Ofrece habitaciones con una decoración única y conexión WiFi gratuita. No se sirven comidas.
Todas las habitaciones del The The Litchfield Inn cuentan con TV por cable. Todas las habitaciones disponen de control de temperatura individual. Algunas habitaciones presentan un diseño temático.
El establecimiento alberga un centro de negocios.
Todas las habitaciones incluyen un desayuno diario de 07:00 a 10:00.
El White Memorial Conservation Center está a 1 milla del establecimiento. El Museo del Ferrocarril de Nueva Inglaterra está a 16 minutos en coche.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,2 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
This Litchfield, Connecticut guest accommodation is 3.4 miles from Topsmead State Forest. The property features uniquely decorated guest rooms with free WiFi. On-site dining is not available.
Cable TV is included in all rooms at The The Litchfield Inn. Individual climate control is provided in every room. Some rooms feature a themed design.
A business centre is available at the property.
Breakfast is included with all rooms 7 to 10 am daily.
The White Memorial Conservation Center is 1 mile from the property. The Railroad Museum of New England is a 16-minute drive away.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,2 para uma viagem a dois.
A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap

This Litchfield, Connecticut guest accommodation is 3.4 miles from Topsmead State Forest. The property features uniquely decorated guest rooms with free WiFi. On-site dining is not available.
Cable TV is included in all rooms at The The Litchfield Inn. Individual climate control is provided in every room. Some rooms feature a themed design.
A business centre is available at the property.
Breakfast is included with all rooms 7 to 10 am daily.
The White Memorial Conservation Center is 1 mile from the property. The Railroad Museum of New England is a 16-minute drive away.
